items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Commits $10M CAD to Canadian AI Research
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 承諾 1000 萬加元支持加拿大 AI 研究
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic announced a $10 million CAD investment in Canadian AI research institutions including Amii, Mila, Vector Institute, and several universities and health organizations. The funding supports beneficial AI applications in areas like reinforcement learning, health, and responsible AI.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 宣布投資 1000 萬加元予加拿大 AI 研究機構，包括 Amii、Mila、Vector Institute 及多所大學與健康組織。資金用於支持強化學習、健康與負責任 AI 等有益應用。
items_flat.quote: We’re committing $10 million CAD to Canadian research institutions to fund the next generation of this work.
items_flat.quote_zh: 我們承諾投入 1000 萬加元予加拿大研究機構，以資助這項工作的下一世代。

items_flat.title_en: Demis Hassabis Calls for U.S.-Led Frontier AI Oversight Framework
items_flat.title_zh: Demis Hassabis 呼籲美國領導前沿 AI 監督框架
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis published a call for urgent U.S.-led oversight of frontier AI models, proposing a standards body to test capabilities and address risks like cybersecurity and deceptive AI.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis 發文呼籲美國緊急領導前沿 AI 模型監督，提議成立標準機構測試能力並處理網路安全與欺騙性 AI 等風險。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI's First Hardware Device Reported as Portable AI Speaker
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 首款硬體設備據報為可攜式 AI 音箱
items_flat.summary_en: Bloomberg and Reuters reported OpenAI's first consumer hardware is a portable, screen-free smart speaker designed as a humanlike AI companion for the home. The device is still in development.
items_flat.summary_zh: Bloomberg 與 Reuters 報導 OpenAI 首款消費硬體為可攜式無螢幕智慧音箱，設計作為居家類人 AI 伴侶。產品仍在開發中。

items_flat.title_en: xAI/SpaceXAI Purges User Data After Grok Build Privacy Incident
items_flat.title_zh: xAI/SpaceXAI 在 Grok Build 隱私事件後清除用戶資料
items_flat.summary_en: Following reports of Grok Build uploading code repositories to cloud storage, xAI committed to deleting all previously uploaded user data and implemented fixes for zero data retention.
items_flat.summary_zh: 在 Grok Build 被報上傳程式碼儲存庫至雲端後，xAI 承諾刪除先前所有用戶資料，並實施零資料保留修正。
items_flat.quote: As a precautionary measure, all user data that was uploaded to SpaceXAI before now will be completely and utterly deleted.
items_flat.quote_zh: 作為預防措施，所有先前上傳至 SpaceXAI 的用戶資料將被完全徹底刪除。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Reports Explosive Growth for GPT-5.6 Sol
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 報告 GPT-5.6 Sol 爆炸性成長
items_flat.summary_en: Sam Altman highlighted insane growth of GPT-5.6 Sol with inference scaling. OpenAI reset usage limits for Codex and ChatGPT Work reaching 8M active users. Recent updates include enhanced search.
items_flat.summary_zh: Sam Altman 強調 GPT-5.6 Sol 成長驚人，推理團隊全力支援。OpenAI 重置 Codex 與 ChatGPT Work 使用限制，活躍用戶達 800 萬。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Pushes Back on Apple Trade Secret Lawsuit
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 反擊蘋果營業秘密訴訟
items_flat.summary_en: OpenAI responded to Apple's trade secret lawsuit involving former employees, stating the complaint lacks merit while affirming commitment to fair competition.
items_flat.summary_zh: OpenAI 回應蘋果針對前員工的營業秘密訴訟，表示指控缺乏根據，並強調支持公平競爭。
items_flat.quote: While we take these allegations seriously, we’re not aware of any evidence that this complaint has merit.
items_flat.quote_zh: 雖然我們認真看待這些指控，但我們不認為此訴訟有根據。

items_flat.title_en: Meta AI Model Achieves Perfect Score on Asian Physics Olympiad
items_flat.title_zh: Meta AI 模型在亞洲物理奧林匹克獲滿分
items_flat.summary_en: Meta AI submitted a model that scored a perfect 30/30 on the theoretical exam of the 2026 Asian Physics Olympiad, tying with top student contestants.
items_flat.summary_zh: Meta AI 提交的模型在 2026 年亞洲物理奧林匹克理論考試中獲得完美 30/30 分，與頂尖學生參賽者並列。

brief_en: On 2026-07-15: OpenAI faces Apple trade-secret lawsuit and reports first hardware device as portable AI speaker companion. xAI/SpaceXAI addresses Grok Build privacy breach by purging user data. Meta AI model scores perfect on Asian Physics Olympiad. Anthropic's Canadian research investment and Google DeepMind oversight call continue from yesterday.
brief_zh: 2026-07-15 要點：OpenAI 遭蘋果營業秘密訴訟，首款硬體設備據報為可攜式 AI 伴侶音箱。xAI/SpaceXAI 處理 Grok Build 隱私問題並清除用戶資料。Meta AI 模型在亞洲物理奧林匹克完美得分。Anthropic 加拿大研究投資與 Google DeepMind 監督呼籲延續昨日。
